data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'Progress percentage display', but the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this feature is implemented. While the linked use case mentions a provider dashboard showing an 85% completion, it does not provide concrete evidence of how this percentage is calculated or displayed through an API. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement for the progress percentage display.
evidencePointers: The linked use case mentions a provider dashboard showing 85% completion but lacks details on the API or mechanism for the progress percentage display.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or persisted state checks confirming the implementation of the 'Progress percentage display'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
